result:
The spec is fully implemented and the project builds cleanly with no warnings or errors (1 of 10 build cycles used).

I added the two missing operations to `TextUtils.cs`, following the existing static-class style:

- **`Truncate(s, maxLen)`** — returns `s` unchanged when it already fits; otherwise appends `"..."` after the first `maxLen - 3` characters when `maxLen > 3`, or takes a plain prefix of length `maxLen` when the ellipsis doesn't fit (including `maxLen == 0` → empty string).
- **`WordCount(s)`** — uses `s.Split(null, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)`, where the null separator splits on all whitespace (spaces, tabs, CR, LF) and `RemoveEmptyEntries` collapses leading/trailing/repeated whitespace, so empty and whitespace-only strings yield 0.

`Slugify` is untouched, and both new functions are pure string computations on the pinned public surface.
